options.command: FEATURE_CDK_EMCNOTARY_STACKS_ENABLED=1 if [ -n "$DOMAIN" ] && [ "$DOMAIN" != "emcnotary.com" ]; then echo "Note: Emptying buckets for domain $DOMAIN"; DOMAIN=$DOMAIN APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/core pnpm nx run admin-s3-empty:empty || true; else pnpm nx run admin-s3-empty:empty:emcnotary || true; fi && node ../../../../dist/libs/infra/config-loader/bin/cdk-deploy.js destroy --force ${DOMAIN:+--context domain=$DOMAIN}
AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/core pnpm nx run admin-stack-info:get

admin:info.description: Get core stack information (outputs, instance details, etc.)

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/core MAX_RESULTS=${MAX_RESULTS:-50} pnpm nx run admin-stack-events:events
AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/core FAILED_ONLY=1 pnpm nx run admin-stack-events:events

admin:events:failed.description: Get only failed CloudFormation stack events

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/core pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/test-core-deployed.cli.ts

admin:test:core-deployed.description: Prerequisite test: Verify core stack is deployed and required outputs exist

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/core pnpm nx run admin-reverse-dns:set

admin:reverse-dns.description: Set reverse DNS for Elastic IP (box.{domain})

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/core DRY_RUN=${DRY_RUN:-0} pnpm nx run admin-s3-empty:empty

admin:s3-empty.description: Empty S3 buckets in core stack (required before destroy)

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/core DRY_RUN=1 pnpm nx run admin-s3-empty:empty

admin:s3-empty:dry-run.description: Dry run: Show what would be emptied from S3 buckets
